title: Fresh Peruvian Wheat Roast
description: A crisp, herb-infused wheat loaf with a kick of red chilli powder, roasted to golden perfection for a satisfying solo dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking sheet with parchment.
In a large bowl, whisk together wheat flour, salt, red chilli powder, and crushed garlic.
Add olive oil and mix until crumbly.
Gradually add water, stirring until dough forms.
Transfer dough to a floured surface and knead for 8 minutes until elastic.
Shape dough into a round loaf and place on the prepared sheet.
Brush the top with lemon juice and scatter chopped cilantro and oregano.
Bake for 25 minutes until golden and crisp.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
